_schema: Archive Index v1 — Records-only write access. All agents may read to check existence. To retrieve a file, dispatch findasale-records.

entries.summary: Stale document showing 5%/7% fee structure. Locked fee is 10% flat (Session 106). Not referenced in codebase. Superseded by pricing-and-tiers-overview-2026-03-15.md and locked decisions in STATE.md.

entries.topic: CD2 Phase 2 — Treasure Hunt Mode implementation spec
entries.summary: Full implementation handoff spec for Treasure Hunt Mode: schema (TreasureHunt + TreasureHuntFind models), backend service + routes, frontend banner + item detail integration, AI clue generation prompt. Feature is shipped. docs/ directory is unauthorized — archived and source pending deletion.

entries.topic: Agent fleet quick reference — routing map
entries.summary: Agent-to-task routing map and pipeline patterns. Stale — references eliminated agents (findasale-cx, findasale-support, findasale-rd, findasale-pitchman) and superseded scheduled tasks. Replaced by each agent's SKILL.md trigger descriptions and conversation-defaults routing rules.

entries.topic: Camera Workflow v2 — Phases 1-2 complete, 3-6 implementation handoff
entries.summary: Point-in-time implementation status doc for Camera Workflow v2. Phases 1-2 (DB schema + backend) confirmed complete. Phases 3-6 (on-device processing, publishing page, multi-photo carousel) were the implementation target for sessions 148+. Superseded by completed code — Phase 5 confirmed wired in session 148.

entries.topic: Stripe webhook hardening — beta production readiness
entries.summary: Implementation record for Stripe webhook hardening: idempotency (StripeEvent model), expanded event handlers, Sentry error tracking. Status: Complete. Commits 43f64a6, cd43b93, 2f85116 on main. Superseded by code in stripeController.ts.

Full fleet redesign planning doc (22 decisions). All decisions approved by Patrick and implemented in sessions 143-145: 5 new agents, 2 merges, 12-seat board restructure, 6 subcommittees, 2 scheduled tasks. Superseded by installed skills and SKILL.md files.
